Bash(cd D:/code/pm-vibe-coding/clinic-scheduler/apps/web && for f in \\
  "app/\(dashboard\)/patients/page.tsx" \\
  "app/\(dashboard\)/doctors/page.tsx" \\
  "app/\(dashboard\)/appointments/page.tsx" \\
  "app/\(dashboard\)/notifications/page.tsx" \\
  "app/\(dashboard\)/profile/page.tsx" \\
  "app/login/page.tsx" \\
  "app/register/page.tsx" \\
  "app/forgot-password/page.tsx" \\
  "app/reset-password/page.tsx" \\
  "app/page.tsx" \\
  "components/layout/notification-bell.tsx" \\
  "components/ui/skeleton.tsx" \\
  "components/ui/empty-state.tsx" \\
  "components/ui/page-header.tsx"; do
  sed -i 's/divide-\\[--border\\]/divide-gray-200/g' "$f"
  sed -i 's/text-\\[--border\\]/text-gray-200/g' "$f"
  sed -i "s/bg-\\[--border\\]/bg-gray-200/g" "$f"
  sed -i "s/border-\\[--primary\\]\\/40/border-blue-500\\/40/g" "$f"
  sed -i "s/hover:border-\\[--primary\\]\\/40/hover:border-blue-500\\/40/g" "$f"
  sed -i "s/border-\\[--primary\\]\\/30/border-blue-600\\/30/g" "$f"
done
echo "Done")
Bash(cd D:/code/pm-vibe-coding/clinic-scheduler && npx turbo build --filter=@carequeue/web 2>&1 | tail -30)

Bash(cd "D:/code/pm-vibe-coding/clinic-scheduler" && for f in \\
  "apps/web/app/\(dashboard\)/patients/[id]/page.tsx" \\
  "apps/web/app/\(dashboard\)/patients/[id]/edit/page.tsx" \\
  "apps/web/app/\(dashboard\)/doctors/[id]/page.tsx" \\
  "apps/web/app/\(dashboard\)/doctors/new/page.tsx" \\
  "apps/web/app/\(dashboard\)/doctors/[id]/edit/page.tsx" \\
  "apps/web/app/\(dashboard\)/doctors/[id]/availability/page.tsx"; do
  sed -i \\
    -e 's/hover:bg-\\[#2563EB\\]\\/5/hover:bg-teal-600\\/5/g' \\
    -e 's/bg-\\[#2563EB\\]\\/10/bg-teal-600\\/10/g' \\
    -e 's/border-\\[#2563EB\\]\\/30/border-teal-600\\/30/g' \\
    -e 's/border-\\[#2563EB\\]\\/20/border-teal-600\\/20/g' \\
    -e 's/focus:ring-\\[#2563EB\\]/focus:ring-teal-500/g' \\
    -e 's/hover:bg-\\[#2563EB\\]/hover:bg-teal-600/g' \\
    -e 's/bg-\\[#2563EB\\]/bg-teal-600/g' \\
    -e 's/text-\\[#2563EB\\]/text-teal-600/g' \\
    -e 's/hover:text-\\[#2563EB\\]/hover:text-teal-600/g' \\
    -e 's/border-\\[#2563EB\\]/border-teal-600/g' \\
    -e 's/text-\\[#EF4444\\]/text-rose-600/g' \\
    -e 's/hover:bg-blue-700/hover:bg-teal-700/g' \\
    -e 's/bg-blue-600/bg-teal-600/g' \\
    -e 's/text-blue-600/text-teal-600/g' \\
    -e 's/hover:bg-\\[#0EA5E9\\]\\/5/hover:bg-sky-500\\/5/g' \\
    -e 's/bg-\\[#0EA5E9\\]\\/10/bg-sky-500\\/10/g' \\
    -e 's/border-\\[#0EA5E9\\]\\/30/border-sky-500\\/30/g' \\
    -e 's/bg-\\[#0EA5E9\\]/bg-sky-500/g' \\
    -e 's/text-\\[#0EA5E9\\]/text-sky-600/g' \\
    -e 's/bg-\\[#10B981\\]/bg-emerald-500/g' \\
    -e 's/hover:bg-gray-50\\/50/hover:bg-[#F7F8F6]/g' \\
    -e 's/bg-gray-50\\/50/bg-[#F7F8F6]\\/60/g' \\
    -e 's/hover:bg-gray-100/hover:bg-[#F0F1EE]/g' \\
    -e 's/hover:bg-gray-50/hover:bg-[#F7F8F6]/g' \\
    -e 's/bg-gray-100/bg-[#F0F1EE]/g' \\
    -e 's/bg-gray-50/bg-[#F7F8F6]/g' \\
    -e 's/divide-gray-200/divide-[#E2E4DE]/g' \\
    -e 's/divide-gray-50/divide-[#F0F1EE]/g' \\
    -e 's/border-gray-200/border-[#E2E4DE]/g' \\
    -e 's/border-gray-100/border-[#E2E4DE]/g' \\
    -e 's/text-gray-900/text-[#1A1D1F]/g' \\
    -e 's/text-gray-700/text-[#374151]/g' \\
    -e 's/text-gray-600/text-[#4B5563]/g' \\
    -e 's/text-gray-500/text-[#6B7280]/g' \\
    -e 's/text-gray-400/text-[#9CA3AF]/g' \\
    -e 's/text-gray-300/text-[#D1D5DB]/g' \\
    -e 's/text-gray-200/text-[#E5E7EB]/g' \\
    -e 's/text-red-500/text-rose-600/g' \\
    -e 's/text-red-600/text-rose-600/g' \\
    -e 's/bg-red-50/bg-rose-50/g' \\
    -e 's/border-red-100/border-rose-100/g' \\
    -e 's/text-red-700/text-rose-700/g' \\
    -e 's/text-red-400/text-rose-400/g' \\
    -e 's/bg-green-50/bg-emerald-50/g' \\
    -e 's/text-green-700/text-emerald-700/g' \\
    "$f"
  echo "Done: $f"
done)

Bash(TOKEN="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbW1vcDl0cWQwMDAwNzU4ZzcwZTVnc3huIiwiZW1haWwiOiJhZG1pbkBjYXJlcXVldWUuY29tIiwicm9sZSI6IkFETUlOIiwiaWF0IjoxNzczNDA3OTg1LCJleHAiOjE3NzQwMTI3ODV9.LThzpuDzSjOyG6Tae7L2XILLcp2jGyHhLRFCwiU2FGw"
API="http://localhost:3001/api/v1"
A="Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN"

echo "=== ALL DOCTORS ==="
curl -s "$API/doctors" -H "$A" | python -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
docs = d.get\('data', d\) if isinstance\(d, dict\) else d
if isinstance\(docs, dict\) and 'data' in docs:
    docs = docs['data']
for doc in \(docs if isinstance\(docs, list\) else [docs]\):
    print\(f'{doc[\\"id\\"]} - Dr. {doc.get\(\\"user\\",{}\).get\(\\"firstName\\",\\"?\\"\)} {doc.get\(\\"user\\",{}\).get\(\\"lastName\\",\\"?\\"\)} \({doc.get\(\\"specialization\\",\\"?\\"\)}\)'\)
"

echo ""
echo "=== ALL PATIENTS ==="
curl -s "$API/patients" -H "$A" | python -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
pts = d.get\('data', d\) if isinstance\(d, dict\) else d
if isinstance\(pts, dict\) and 'data' in pts:
    pts = pts['data']
for p in \(pts if isinstance\(pts, list\) else [pts]\):
    print\(f'{p[\\"id\\"]} - {p.get\(\\"user\\",{}\).get\(\\"firstName\\",\\"?\\"\)} {p.get\(\\"user\\",{}\).get\(\\"lastName\\",\\"?\\"\)}'\)
")

Bash(TOKEN="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbW1vcDl0cWQwMDAwNzU4ZzcwZTVnc3huIiwiZW1haWwiOiJhZG1pbkBjYXJlcXVldWUuY29tIiwicm9sZSI6IkFETUlOIiwiaWF0IjoxNzczNDA3OTg1LCJleHAiOjE3NzQwMTI3ODV9.LThzpuDzSjOyG6Tae7L2XILLcp2jGyHhLRFCwiU2FGw"
API="http://localhost:3001/api/v1"
A="Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN"

echo "=== DASHBOARD STATS ==="
curl -s "$API/dashboard/stats" -H "$A" | python -m json.tool

echo ""
echo "=== APPOINTMENT SUMMARY ==="
curl -s "$API/appointments" -H "$A" | python -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
appts = d.get\('data', []\)
statuses = {}
for a in appts:
    s = a.get\('status','?'\)
    statuses[s] = statuses.get\(s,0\)+1
print\(f'Total appointments: {len\(appts\)}'\)
for s,c in sorted\(statuses.items\(\)\):
    print\(f'  {s}: {c}'\)
")
